description:
# Storybook Coverage

Delete 5 duplicate stories from apps/ui, add missing atom stories in libs/ui, add stories for the 6 molecule components, and set up Chromatic CI integration.

## Phases
1. Delete duplicate app-level stories
2. Add molecule stories
3. Set up Chromatic CI integration
title: [Epic] Storybook Coverage
